title: サイレンススズカ、覚醒①

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On one of my days off...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though we don't have training scheduled,
Taiki Shuttle drops by my office.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yessiree! Actually, my good pals Suzuka and
Fukukitaru are competing today!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I came to see if ya wanna watch the race with me
on TV and cheer 'em on!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Got any carrot juice on hand? We can use it to
celebrate if either of 'em win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki and I sit down to watch the race together...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has stolen the lead with her
runaway style—the gap continues to widen as she
speeds down the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This race has become hers alone! She crosses the
finish line, the competition ten lengths behind!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that was fantastic! Way to go, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe she won a graded race by such a
huge margin...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka's been doin' amazing ever since she came
back from Hong Kong! That's her fourth win in a
row!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
As her friend, I couldn't be happier! I'm gonna
give her a big hug once she gets back to the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka has taken on numerous challenges in
search of her own unique running style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like she's finally found her answer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Suzuka won! This calls for a party!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After such a memorable race, one thing is for
sure—we can't afford to take our eyes off of
Silence Suzuka.
